allow: PowerShell($gitPath = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd"; if \(Test-Path "$gitPath\\git.exe"\) { $env:Path = "$gitPath;$env:Path"; git --version } else { Write-Output "not at default path, searching..."; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Git","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git" -Filter git.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName })
